title: sphaeranthus volgensis
intro: Sphaeranthus volgensis, also known as the Russian button or Volga button, is a flowering plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin conditions. Sphaeranthus volgensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
